name: API Gateway Layer
description: FastAPI entry point and MCP transport that mount REST endpoints for code execution and generation, proxy downstream MCP servers, and manage the server lifecycle via lifespan hooks.

name: Security & Middleware
description: Cross-cutting gateway enforcement layer providing API key authentication, CORS configuration, Redis-backed rate limiting with named presets, audit logging, and OpenTelemetry distributed tracing.

name: Ops Automation Scripts
description: Autonomous operations pipeline that monitors MCP server health, triggers multi-agent Claude think-tank analysis on faults, executes remediation action plans, and reports results to Notion.

name: Test Suite
description: Unit, integration, and smoke tests covering the gateway API, security middleware, rate-limit presets, audit store, Docker runner, and the full watchdog-to-action ops pipeline.

name: Registry & Runtime Data
description: MCP server registry JSON, backup snapshots, the well-known discovery card, and execution logs that record the live fleet of registered downstream servers and automation run history.

name: Example MCP Servers
description: Reference implementations of FusionAL-compatible MCP servers (dice-roller, file-utils, weather-api) demonstrating tool conventions, containerization, and integration patterns.

name: Infrastructure
description: Container build definitions, Docker Compose orchestration, debug overrides, and Hermes maintenance scripts that package and operate the FusionAL gateway in Docker environments.

name: Configuration
description: Environment variable templates, client integration configs, Git attributes, and tooling ignore rules that parameterise the gateway and its development toolchain.

name: Documentation
description: Project guides, API references, security hardening runbooks, contributor workflows, troubleshooting docs, and MCP builder guidelines covering every aspect of deploying and extending FusionAL.
